example_prompt: Opprett og send ein faktura til kunden Fjelltopp AS (org.nr 978484042) på 14250 kr eksklusiv MVA for Programvarelisens.
Create the customer Oakwood Ltd with organization number 927790629. The address is Solveien 71, 5003 Bergen. Email: post@oakwood.no.
expected_workflow: POST /customer {name, isCustomer:true, organizationNumber, email, postalAddress:{addressLine1, postalCode, city}, physicalAddress:{...}}

example_prompt: Register the supplier Silveroak Ltd with organization number 811867500. Email: faktura@silveroakltd.no.
Erstellen Sie das Produkt 'Softwarelizenz' mit der Produktnummer 7986. Der Preis betraegt 24900 NOK ohne MwSt., mit dem Standardsatz von 25 %.
Create the project 'Upgrade Windmill' linked to the customer Windmill Ltd (org no. 971465336). The project manager is Alice Smith (alice.smith@example.org).
Opprett ein fri rekneskapsdimensjon 'Marked' med verdiane 'Privat' og 'Bedrift'. Bokfoer deretter eit bilag paa konto 6590 for 18700 kr, knytt til dimensjonsverdien 'Privat'.
Register a travel expense for William Wilson for 'Client visit Trondheim'. The trip lasted 2 days with per diem (daily rate 800 NOK). Expenses: flight ticket 7600 NOK and taxi 700 NOK.
root_cause: paymentType missing, parallel POSTs cause RevisionException

example_prompt: You received an employment contract (see attached PDF). Create the employee in Tripletex with all details from the contract.
expected_workflow: Read PDF for: name, email, DOB, national ID, department, occupation code, salary, employment %, start date
POST /employee {firstName, lastName, email, dateOfBirth, nationalIdentityNumber, userType:'EXTENDED', department:{id}}
root_cause: Occupation code brute-force loop burns all turns, never creates employment details

example_prompt: Execute the complete project lifecycle for 'System Upgrade Greenfield': budget 206300 NOK, log time for 2 employees, generate invoice.
root_cause: Agent deletes/recreates timesheet entries in loop, never reaches invoice step

example_prompt: Gjer maanavslutninga for mars 2026. Periodiser forskotsbetalt kostnad (12000 kr per maanad fraa konto 1700 til kostnadskonto). Bokfoer manadleg avskriving for driftsmiddel.
root_cause: All entries in single voucher, scoring expects separate vouchers per operation

example_prompt: Executez la paie de Raphael Bernard (raphael.bernard@example.org) pour ce mois. Le salaire de base est de 33900 NOK. Ajoutez une prime unique de 7450 NOK.
expected_workflow: POST /salary/transaction {date, year, month, payslips:[{employee:{id}, specifications:[{salaryType:{id}, rate:33900, count:1}, {salaryType:{id}, rate:7450, count:1}]}]}
root_cause: arbeidsforhold error triggers auto-employment (27s), LLM says done without retrying salary POST

example_prompt: We have discovered errors in the general ledger for January and February 2026. Review all vouchers and find the 4 errors.
expected_workflow: Analyze: wrong account, duplicate voucher, missing VAT, wrong amount
POST /ledger/voucher (correction for each error - reverse + correct)
root_cause: Slow individual posting lookups, sometimes times out

example_prompt: Log 35 hours for Ines Ferreira on activity 'Testing' in project 'Configuracao cloud' for Floresta Lda. Hourly rate: 1000 NOK/h. Generate project invoice.
root_cause: Uses general activity instead of project-specific, delete/recreate loop, never invoices
